sarah.name: Sarah K.
sarah.text: This platform helped me pass my driving test on the first try! The quizzes are very realistic and the video lessons made everything so clear.

james.name: James M.
james.text: The video lessons and road sign library are comprehensive. Highly recommended for new drivers. I feel confident behind the wheel now.

peter.name: Peter O.
peter.text: I love the leaderboard feature. It motivates me to keep learning and improving my scores. The premium subscription is totally worth it.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Road Rules

account.q: How do I create an account?
account.a: Click the "Sign Up" button on the top right corner, fill in your details (full name, email, and password), and submit. You will receive a confirmation email to verify your account.

free.q: Is the platform free to use?
free.a: Yes! We offer free quizzes, video lessons, and access to our road signs library. Premium features like certification exams, PDF downloads, and advanced analytics require a subscription or one-time payment.

subscription.q: How do I purchase a subscription?
subscription.a: Go to the Pricing page, choose a plan (Monthly, Quarterly, or Yearly), and complete payment via MTN MoMo, Airtel Money, or Visa/Mastercard. Your subscription activates immediately after successful payment.

attempts.q: How many quiz attempts do I get?
attempts.a: Free quizzes allow up to 3 attempts per quiz. Premium exams have unlimited attempts during your subscription period.

certificate.q: How do I get my certificate?
certificate.a: Pass a premium certification exam with a score of 80% or higher. Your certificate will be available for download in PDF format from your dashboard.

materials.a: Free documents can be downloaded anytime. Premium documents require either an active subscription or a one-time payment of 2,800 FRW per document.

aiChat.q: How does the AI Chat work?
aiChat.a: The AI Assistant can answer your road rules questions by searching through the library documents and question database. It provides answers with explanations in both Kinyarwanda and English.

payment.a: We accept MTN MoMo, Airtel Money, and Visa/Mastercard. All payments are processed securely through our platform.

resetPassword.q: How do I reset my password?
resetPassword.a: Click "Forgot Password" on the login page, enter your registered email, and follow the instructions sent to your inbox.

mobile.q: Can I use the platform on mobile?
mobile.a: Yes! Our platform is fully responsive and works on all devices. You can study on-the-go using your smartphone or tablet.

about.title: About Road Rules
about.subtitle: Empowering drivers with the knowledge to stay safe on the road
about.para1: Road Rules is an online learning platform dedicated to helping drivers master road traffic rules, recognize traffic signs, and prepare for their driving exams. We believe that safe driving starts with quality education.
about.para2: Our platform offers interactive quizzes, video lessons, a comprehensive library of road rules, and AI-powered assistance to make learning accessible and effective for everyone.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To reduce road accidents by providing accessible, high-quality driver education that prepares individuals for safe and responsible driving.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: A world where every driver is well-educated on road safety, leading to safer roads and fewer traffic incidents across communities.

values.title: Our Values
values.desc: Accessibility, accuracy, and continuous improvement. We ensure our content is up-to-date with the latest traffic regulations and accessible to all learners.

whoWeServe.title: Who We Serve
whoWeServe.desc: Learner drivers, driving schools, and anyone looking to refresh their knowledge of road traffic rules and safe driving practices.

about.hallOfFameSub: Meet the team behind Road Rules
about.howWeHelpSub: Everything you need to master road rules and pass your driving test with confidence.

aiChat.title: AI Learning Assistant
aiChat.subtitle: Ask questions, get taught — not just answered. I search your books first.
aiChat.welcomeDesc: I read your library books so I can teach you road rules properly. Ask me anything — I'll explain like an instructor, not just give answers.
aiChat.inputPlaceholder: Ask about road rules... (try: explain, teach me, why is, example, test me)
